name: The Greater Will
epithet: the Outer God of golden Order

name: The Frenzied Flame
epithet: the yellow chaos that would melt all distinctions

name: The Scarlet Rot
epithet: the bloom that devours from within

name: Destined Death
epithet: the Rune of Death, removed from the Ring

name: The Formless Mother
epithet: the wound-loving god of blood

name: The Fell God's Flame
epithet: the fire that burns the Erdtree

name: The Ancient Dragons' Red Lightning
epithet: the storm of the dragon era

name: The Crucible
epithet: the primordial blend of all life

name: Queen Marika the Eternal
epithet: the god of the Golden Order, who shattered the Ring

name: Dragonlord Placidusax
epithet: the Elden Lord before the gold, waiting outside time

name: The Eternal Cities
epithet: Nokron and Nokstella, under the false night sky

name: Miquella the Unalloyed
epithet: the Empyrean cursed with eternal youth

name: Ranni the Witch
epithet: the Empyrean who chose the dark moon

name: The Elden Beast
epithet: the living incarnation of the Ring

name: The Tarnished
epithet: the graceless exile called back to the Ring

name: Melina
epithet: the kindling maiden with the burned eye

name: Torrent
epithet: the spectral steed

name: Godfrey, First Elden Lord
epithet: Hoarah Loux, the warrior who was banished to return

name: Morgott
epithet: the despised son who defended the Order that scorned him

name: Mohg, Lord of Blood
epithet: the Omen who chose the Formless Mother

name: Starscourge Radahn
epithet: the general who held back the stars

name: Malenia, Blade of Miquella
epithet: the undefeated swordswoman who contains the Rot

name: Rykard
epithet: the praetor who fed himself to the serpent

name: Godrick the Grafted
epithet: the lowest of the golden line, grown monstrous by grafting

name: Rennala
epithet: the moon scholar broken by love

name: Maliketh, the Black Blade
epithet: the shadow-beast who keeps Death

name: The Elden Ring
epithet: the Order itself, shattered

name: The Erdtree
epithet: the golden tree at the center of the world

name: Grace
epithet: the golden guidance of the Erdtree
